content_body: Just had to leave a note to say thank you for such a beautiful place. The drive in was engaging to say the least! But fun! We have been in mid-Florida for almost 10 years and were really needing to connect to the fall colors and cool air again…With most of our family here, my cousin and I snuck out for a few hours and took in the orchard just down the road. We were completely amazed at all the variety there. Then we headed to Blue Ridge to shop a little…we had a blast! We will have to come again sometimes – some of our crew had the flu and stayed home but my husband got here and was sick the whole weekend. He still has enjoyed the visit though. He is a teacher and enjoyed the getaway! Thanks again!
title: Amazed at the Variety!
